title: sideritis × angustifolia subsp. mediovalentina
intro: Sideritis × angustifolia subsp. mediovalentina is a hybrid plant species within the genus Sideritis, commonly known as the mountain tea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sideritis × angustifolia subsp. mediovalentina include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tea, infusion, and capsule forms, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels.
